title: CodeClimate Visualiser project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for the CodeClimate Visualiser VS Code extension. Place this file at .vscode/codeclimate-visualiser.json.

customColumns.description: Extra columns to display in the issue table.

index.description: Display order alongside built-in columns (Severity=0, Category=1, Check Name=2, Source=3, File=4, Line=5, Description=6). Custom columns with the same index as a built-in appear after it. Any value > 6 places the column last.

showQuickFilter.description: Show quick-filter badges for this column's unique values in the main webview filter bar.

showFilter.description: Show a text filter input for this column in the sidebar filter panel.

showChart.description: Show a pie chart for this column's value distribution.

fromField.description: Dot-path into the issue object (e.g. 'location.path'). When set, the column value is extracted from each issue's field using fieldRegex, overriding any value from reportPatterns.

fieldRegex.description: Regular expression applied to the issue field named by fromField. The capture group selected by captureGroup (default 0) becomes the column value.

captureGroup.description: 0-indexed capture group from fieldRegex to use as the value.

historyPath.description: Path to the history snapshot file (NDJSON). Relative to workspace root or absolute. Defaults to .vscode/codeclimate-visualiser.history.ndjson.

actions.description: Background actions that can be triggered manually from the Actions tab or automatically on file save.

label.description: Display name shown in the Actions tab.

description.description: Optional description shown below the label.

hidden.description: Hide this action from the Actions tab (it can still be triggered by onSave or as a chain target).

command.description: Shell command to execute (runs in workspace root). Forwarded args from a chaining action are substituted as $1, $2 … (or ${1}, ${2} …).

vsCodeCommand.description: VS Code command ID to execute (e.g. 'codeclimateVisualiser.reloadConfig').

onSave.description: Glob pattern(s) — trigger this action automatically when a matching file is saved.

id.description: ID of the action to run.

args.description: Arguments forwarded to the called action (vsCodeCommand args, or $1/$2 … in a shell command).

then.description: Actions to run sequentially after this one succeeds. Each item is an action id, or { id, args } to forward parameters.

refreshView.description: Reload issues from configured report files after this action completes.

examples.label: Run Analysis
examples.description: Execute CodeClimate analysis and refresh the view.

reportPatterns.description: Glob patterns or absolute paths to CodeClimate JSON/NDJSON report files. Each entry is either a plain glob string or a pattern object with optional regex extraction for custom column values.

oneOf.description: Workspace-relative glob pattern or absolute path.

glob.description: Workspace-relative glob pattern or absolute path.

regex.description: Regular expression applied to the matched filename (basename). Capture groups are referenced in 'values' via $0, $1, … (0-indexed).

values.description: Map of custom column name → value. Use $0, $1, … for regex capture groups, or plain strings for static values. Null or omitted = empty. Overridden per-issue when the column defines fromField.
